title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" when internet is off after app restart, instead of "Feature unavailable" dialog
steps: 1. Connect new device in Bluetooth settings
4. Tap on 3 dots -> Device Settings page displayed
5. Tap on User Guide -> "Something went wrong" screen displayed
6. Tap on "X" -> Screen closes and Device settings page is displayed
expected: If the app is restarted, a "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear.
